# Inference.net (Catalyst) - docs index (mirror of https://docs.inference.net/llms.txt)
# Captured 2026-06-27. Source of truth is the live URL above.

> Use Inference.net to observe, evaluate, train, and deploy LLM systems.

## API
- API quickstart                   https://docs.inference.net/api/api-quickstart.md
- Function calling                 https://docs.inference.net/api/function-calling.md
- Structured outputs               https://docs.inference.net/api/structured-outputs.md
- Vision                           https://docs.inference.net/api/vision.md
- Rate limits                      https://docs.inference.net/api/rate-limits.md
- Data retention                   https://docs.inference.net/api/data-retention.md
- Async overview                   https://docs.inference.net/api/async-inference/overview.md
- Async Batch API                  https://docs.inference.net/api/async-inference/batch-api.md
- Async Group API                  https://docs.inference.net/api/async-inference/group.md
- Async Webhooks (start)           https://docs.inference.net/api/async-inference/webhooks/getting-started-with-webhooks.md
- Async Webhooks (ref)             https://docs.inference.net/api/async-inference/webhooks/quick-reference.md

## CLI (`inf`)
- Install CLI                      https://docs.inference.net/cli/overview.md
- Authentication                   https://docs.inference.net/cli/authentication.md

- Models                           https://docs.inference.net/cli/models.md
- Datasets                         https://docs.inference.net/cli/datasets.md
- Evals                            https://docs.inference.net/cli/evals.md
- HALO                             https://docs.inference.net/cli/halo.md
- Inferences                       https://docs.inference.net/cli/inferences.md
- Instrument                       https://docs.inference.net/cli/instrument.md
- Spans                            https://docs.inference.net/cli/spans.md
- Traces                           https://docs.inference.net/cli/traces.md
- Training                         https://docs.inference.net/cli/training.md
- Dashboard                        https://docs.inference.net/cli/dashboard.md

## Get started
- Record your first LLM call       https://docs.inference.net/get-started/record-first-call.md
- Capture your first trace         https://docs.inference.net/get-started/capture-first-trace.md
- Run your first eval              https://docs.inference.net/get-started/run-first-eval.md
- Analyze your traces              https://docs.inference.net/get-started/analyze-traces.md
- Signals                          https://docs.inference.net/get-started/signals.md
- Train and deploy a custom model  https://docs.inference.net/get-started/train-and-deploy.md

## Platform
- Workflow overview                https://docs.inference.net/workflow.md
- Introduction                     https://docs.inference.net/introduction.md
- Gateway: overview                https://docs.inference.net/platform/gateway/overview.md
- Gateway: integrate               https://docs.inference.net/platform/gateway/integrate.md
- Gateway: create task             https://docs.inference.net/platform/gateway/create-a-task.md
- Gateway: tasks                   https://docs.inference.net/platform/gateway/tasks.md
- Gateway: inference viewer        https://docs.inference.net/platform/gateway/inference-viewer.md
- Gateway: metrics explorer        https://docs.inference.net/platform/gateway/metrics-explorer.md
- Gateway: prompt versions         https://docs.inference.net/platform/gateway/prompt-versions.md
- Eval: overview                   https://docs.inference.net/platform/eval/overview.md
- Eval: writing rubrics            https://docs.inference.net/platform/eval/write-a-rubric.md
- Eval: LLM-as-a-judge             https://docs.inference.net/platform/eval/llm-as-a-judge.md
- Eval: comparisons                https://docs.inference.net/platform/eval/run-a-comparison.md
- Eval: read results               https://docs.inference.net/platform/eval/read-the-results.md
- Eval: offline vs online          https://docs.inference.net/platform/eval/offline-vs-online.md
- Datasets: overview               https://docs.inference.net/platform/datasets/overview.md
- Datasets: upload                 https://docs.inference.net/platform/datasets/upload-a-dataset.md
- Datasets: formats                https://docs.inference.net/platform/datasets/formats.md
- Datasets: from traffic           https://docs.inference.net/platform/datasets/build-from-traffic.md
- Train: overview                  https://docs.inference.net/platform/train/overview.md
- Train: choose recipe             https://docs.inference.net/platform/train/choose-a-recipe.md
- Train: launch a run              https://docs.inference.net/platform/train/launch-a-run.md
- Train: monitor                   https://docs.inference.net/platform/train/mid-training-evals.md
- Train: after training            https://docs.inference.net/platform/train/after-training.md
- Train: troubleshoot              https://docs.inference.net/platform/train/troubleshooting.md
- Deploy: overview                 https://docs.inference.net/platform/deploy/overview.md
- Deploy: open-source models       https://docs.inference.net/platform/deploy/open-source-models.md
- Deploy: deploy a model           https://docs.inference.net/platform/deploy/deploy-a-model.md
- Deploy: call your deployment     https://docs.inference.net/platform/deploy/call-your-deployment.md
- Deploy: serverless               https://docs.inference.net/platform/deploy/serverless-deployments.md
- Deploy: manage & monitor         https://docs.inference.net/platform/deploy/manage-and-monitor.md
